mapper.sql: TIME, HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, OP_GROUP_ID, OP_GROUP_CODE, maxMerge(CPU_RATE_MAX) AS CPU_RATE_MAX, minMerge(CPU_RATE_MIN) AS CPU_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG) AS CPU_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(MEMORY_RATE_MAX) AS MEMORY_RATE_MAX, minMerge(MEMORY_RATE_MIN) AS MEMORY_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(MEMORY_RATE_AVG) AS MEMORY_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(BUFFER_RATE_MAX) AS BUFFER_RATE_MAX, minMerge(BUFFER_RATE_MIN) AS BUFFER_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(BUFFER_RATE_AVG) AS BUFFER_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(CACHED_RATE_MAX) AS CACHED_RATE_MAX, minMerge(CACHED_RATE_MIN) AS CACHED_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(CACHED_RATE_AVG) AS CACHED_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(SWAP_RATE_MAX) AS SWAP_RATE_MAX, minMerge(SWAP_RATE_MIN) AS SWAP_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(SWAP_RATE_AVG) AS SWAP_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(FLOW_STAT_MAX) AS FLOW_STAT_MAX, minMerge(FLOW_STAT_MIN) AS FLOW_STAT_MIN, avgMerge(FLOW_STAT_AVG) AS FLOW_STAT_AVG, maxMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MAX) AS HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MAX, minMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MIN) AS HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG) AS HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX) AS VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX, minMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN) AS VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG) AS VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG, maxMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX) AS OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX, minMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN) AS OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN, avgMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG) AS OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG
mapper.select:
SELECT TIME as time, round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as cpuRate, round(avgMerge(CPU_USAGE_MHZ_AVG),2) as cpuUsage, round(avgMerge(MEMORY_RATE_AVG),2) as memoryRate, HOST_ID as hostId, HOST_POOL_ID as hostpoolId, CLUSTER_ID as clusterId,OP_GROUP_CODE as operatorGroupCode, OP_GROUP_ID as operatorGroupId, round(avgMerge(FLOW_STAT_AVG),2) as flowStat, round(avgMerge(BUFFER_RATE_AVG),2) as bufferRate, round(avgMerge(CACHED_RATE_AVG),2) as cachedRate, round(avgMerge(SWAP_RATE_AVG),2) as swapRate, round(avgMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as hugepageMemRate, round(avgMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as vmGroupMemRate, round(avgMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as ovsGroupMemRate, round(avgMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as flexibleHugepageMemoryRate FROM AGG_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL_5M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND HOST_ID=${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
AND CLUSTER_ID in (${clusterIds})
GROUP BY TIME, HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, OP_GROUP_ID, OP_GROUP_CODE
ORDER BY ${sortField} ASC
ORDER BY ${sortField} DESC

select d.TIME as time,
round(SUM(d.cpuUSED)/SUM(d.cpuWHOLE),2) as cpuRate
if (SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE) == 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(d.hugepageMemoryUSED) / SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE), 2)) AS hugepageMemRate, SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE) as hugepageMemoryTotal
if (SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE) == 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryUSED) / SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE), 2)) AS flexibleHugepageMemoryRate, SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE) as flexibleHugepageMemoryTotal
round(SUM(d.memoryUSED)/SUM(d.memoryWHOLE),2) as memoryRate
FROM (select detail.TIME as TIME,
detail.CPU_RATE* host.cpu cpuUSED, host.cpu cpuWHOLE,
detail.HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE* detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL hugepageMemoryUSED, detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL hugepageMemoryWHOLE,
detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE* detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL flexibleHugepageMemoryUSED, detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE,
detail.MEMORY_RATE* host.memory memoryUSED, host.memory memoryWHOLE,
cluster.id AS CLUSTER_ID FROM
${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOSTPOOL}
${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_CLUSTER}
cluster, (SELECT TIME, HOST_ID,
avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG) as CPU_RATE
avgMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG) as HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE, avgMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL_AVG) as HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL
avgMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG) as FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE, avgMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL_AVG) as FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL
avgMerge(MEMORY_RATE_AVG) as MEMORY_RATE
FROM AGG_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL_5M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_POOL_ID=${hostPoolId}
AND CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
group by HOST_ID,TIME ) detail inner join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} host on detail.HOST_ID=host.id ) d WHERE
d.CLUSTER_ID=${hostPoolId}
d.CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
group by d.CLUSTER_ID, d.TIME ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as cpuRateAvg , maxMerge(CPU_RATE_MAX) as cpuRateMax, minMerge(CPU_RATE_MIN) as cpuRateMin
round(avgMerge(BUFFER_RATE_AVG),2) as bufferRateAvg , maxMerge(BUFFER_RATE_MAX) as bufferRateMax, minMerge(BUFFER_RATE_MIN) as bufferRateMin
round(avgMerge(CACHED_RATE_AVG),2) as cachedRateAvg , maxMerge(CACHED_RATE_MAX) as cachedRateMax, minMerge(CACHED_RATE_MIN) as cachedRateMin
round(avgMerge(SWAP_RATE_AVG),2) as swapRateAvg , maxMerge(SWAP_RATE_MAX) as swapRateMax, minMerge(SWAP_RATE_MIN) as swapRateMin
round(avgMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as hugepageMemRateAvg , maxMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MAX) as hugepageMemRateMax, minMerge(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MIN) as hugepageMemRateMin
round(avgMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as vmGroupMemRateAvg , maxMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX) as vmGroupMemRateMax, minMerge(VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN) as vmGroupMemRateMin
round(avgMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as ovsGroupMemRateAvg , maxMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MAX) as ovsGroupMemRateMax, minMerge(OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE_MIN) as ovsGroupMemRateMin
round(avgMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_AVG),2) as flexibleHugepageMemRateAvg , maxMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MAX) as flexibleHugepageMemRateMax, minMerge(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE_MIN) as flexibleHugepageMemRateMin
round(avgMerge(MEMORY_RATE_AVG),2) as memoryRateAvg , maxMerge(MEMORY_RATE_MAX) as memoryRateMax, minMerge(MEMORY_RATE_MIN) as memoryRateMin
FROM AGG_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL_5M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr
